title: Include RegExp flags and skip nested callback bodies in the hotspot scan.
Grade sibling regression rows with their own class.
Use `fileURLToPath()` and avoid permanently caching a missing dist.
Don't memoize an initial "dist missing" result forever.
Await the `assert.doesNotReject()` calls here.
Tighten the rejected-rationale guard.
Do not mark retryable infra skips as applied.
Do not scan closed sections when `## Open` is missing.
Process user-goal blocks newest-first before applying `max`.
Align `PROPOSAL_SPEC.area` with the new lens catalog.
Don't fabricate a synthesis when the chair failed to link real proposals.
Contain tool-call failures to one lens.
Treat `seenInApp` failures as non-selectable.
Require actual `file:line` evidence here.
Guard against non-object council entries.
Don't send the auth-bypass header to arbitrary `--base-url` targets.
Propagate timeout and websocket failures via the process exit code.
Don't cold-load a fallback model on the "resident-only" path.
Gate on the newest open experiment, not the oldest one.
Key this regression to `STRIKE_LIMIT`, not a hardcoded `2`.
Keep grading baselines in excellence units.
Make stale-lock reclaim atomic.
Gate auto-apply on each preceding step succeeding.
Only reset periodic counters after successful child runs.
Keep capability council out of cold-start cycles.
Propagate remaining budget into composed cycles.
Guard `fix.location` before splitting.
Reject `findLine` values outside the excerpted range.
Do not clamp out-of-scale reviewer scores into a pass.
Terminate the child on keeper shutdown.
Keep polling `/health` after startup.
Do not mark a token-only contrast swap as verified.
Forward `--base-url` to every `apply-consensus` invocation.
Parse the apply summary instead of grepping for `red`.
Create or tolerate the missing `consensus` table before counting commits.
Create the custom event-stream directory before the first emit.
The input-latency probe never waits for the value update.
The new visual/council/live panels are unreachable in the current dashboard shell.
Clear the weakest-class card when the payload no longer has one.
Treat web snippets as untrusted data, not prompt instructions.
Create the log directory before redirecting into it.
Add a TS-capable entrypoint for this CLI
`generateCProgram` is keyed by `lang` but never receives it.
Make the default destination portable and create its parent directory.
Guard the missing class before iterating methods.
Derive the alias and import path from `OUT` with `node:path`.
Wrapper generation drops rest/destructured parameter semantics.
Carry over default and namespace imports too.
Stop descending into nested function bodies when counting loops.
Treat `ui` stuck lessons as visual work too.
Make the brace scan quote-aware.
Use anchor depth here instead of the boolean `grounded` flag.
Guard `writeFile` failures on both apply and rollback.
Clean up git index state when `commit()` fails.
Stop routing `npx` through a shell.
Reject paths that escape the checkout root.
Refuse to commit unless a single target file is explicit.
Fail empty answers before scoring vagueness.
Do not require `readAsBuild` to fail build-shaped deflections.
Exclude in-progress runs from both trend series.
Acceptance sampling should ignore infra-noise rows too.
Don't synthesize a 100% council response rate when telemetry is missing.
Numbered lists currently self-qualify as grounded.
Abort when headroom never arrives.
Keep the vote prompt consistent with `parseBestVote`.
Keep `headline` consistent with custom epsilons.
Resolve `--mode`/`--apply` conflicts before building commands.
Quote the generated `--packet` command the same way as the others.
Don't let warnings mask a failing doctor run.
Don't collapse valid multiline edits into literal `\n` text.
`collectSignals()` is not producing the signal set that `SIGNALS` scores.
Don't synthesize zero-valued samples for unmeasured signals.
Use an ESM-safe default reader.
Evaluate risky-content rules against `find` and `replace` separately.
Don't let failed Semgrep runs count as clean.
Make the disabled-budget assertion exercise the real guard.
Do not treat any digit as grounding.
Measure focus-ring visibility with keyboard focus, not `el.focus()`
Abort stalled Ollama requests.
Close Playwright resources in `finally` blocks.
Remove the Windows-only temp paths.
Make the CLI runtime and temp paths portable.
Drop the hard-coded `c:/tmp` paths.
Make the default output path portable.
Declare `ws` as a direct dependency for this probe.
Don't send `devAuthBypass=1` to arbitrary `VAI_API` hosts.
Resolve on socket close instead of waiting for the full timeout.
/node_modules/
Handle connection failures explicitly.
Guard the missing class before reading `members`.
This judge still passes stack hallucinations if two generic repo tokens happen to match.
Treat missing GitHub ground truth as an infra skip, not a BAD answer.
